props.name: name
props.description: Form field name — the value is submitted under it.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the current value to the side of the track.

props.name: showRange
props.description: Show the min and max reference values under the ends of the track.

props.name: ticks
props.description: Show tick marks at each step (only when the count is reasonable).

props.name: format
props.description: Format the displayed value/range (e.g. add a unit).
